verses.text: A great flying roll, twenty cubits by ten, appears. The written curse. God's law goes forth to find out sin.
A great flying roll, twenty cubits by ten, appears. The written curse. God's law goes forth to find out sin.
This is the curse over the earth, entering the house of the thief and false swearer to consume it. Sin pursued. God's judgment reaches into the very homes of the guilty.
This is the curse over the earth, entering the house of the thief and false swearer to consume it. Sin pursued. God's judgment reaches into the very homes of the guilty.
An ephah appears, a heavy lead cover lifted, and 'a woman' sitting within. Sin contained. Wickedness is shown shut up under God's hand.
An ephah appears, a heavy lead cover lifted, and 'a woman' sitting within. Sin contained. Wickedness is shown shut up under God's hand.
An ephah appears, a heavy lead cover lifted, and 'a woman' sitting within. Sin contained. Wickedness is shown shut up under God's hand.
'This is wickedness'; she is cast into the ephah, and two winged women carry it to Shinar to build it a house. Evil removed. God will banish sin to its own place, far from His people.
